# intl-key-render-plugin

## registerKeyRenderReportPlugin 注册插件

使用示例

```typescript
import I18n from '@ies/starling_intl';
import { registerKeyRenderReportPlugin } from '@ies/intl-key-render-report-plugin';
import type {
  KeyRenderReporterOptions,
  GetProjectAndNs,
  TeaDomain,
} from '@ies/intl-key-render-report-plugin';
const kro = {
  projectId: 7031,
  namespaceId: 61530,
  TEAChannelDomain: 'https://mcs.zijieapi.com',
};
I18n.use(registerKeyRenderReportPlugin(kro));
```

function registerKeyRenderReportPlugin(pluginOptions?: KeyRenderReporterOptions): PostProcessorModule

| 参数              | 说明                                                                                                                                     | 类型                                           | 默认值    | 是否必填 |
| ----------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------- | --------- | -------- |
| projectId         | starling 项目 id                                                                                                                         | number                                         | -         | true     |
| namespaceId       | starling 空间 id                                                                                                                         | number                                         | -         | true     |
| TEAChannelDomain  | tea 上报域名设置，参考[tea 的域名配置](https://bytedance.larkoffice.com/wiki/wikcnKdSt5GhwkiR99p65Rkc5nb)                                | string                                         | -         | true     |
| TEAChannelVersion | tea 上报 path 的 version 设置，一般用默认的即可。参考[tea 的域名配置](https://bytedance.larkoffice.com/wiki/wikcnKdSt5GhwkiR99p65Rkc5nb) | 'v1'\|'v2'                                     | 'v1'      | true     |
| sampleRate        | 采样率                                                                                                                                   | number                                         | 1         | false    |
| strategy          | 上报策略                                                                                                                                 | 'immediately' \| 'hour' \| 'half_day' \| 'day' | 'day'     | false    |
| reportFallback    | 是否上报渲染 fallback 的情况，如果设置 true，则会上报渲染 fallback                                                                       | boolean                                        | false     | false    |
| logger            | 日志函数,debug 用                                                                                                                        | typeof console.log                             | -         | false    |
| getProjectAndNs   | 动态配置 projectId 和 namespaceId 的函数                                                                                                 | 参数参考 ts 接口定义                           | undefined | false    |

## KRRList 调试参数

使用示例

```typescript
import I18n from '@ies/starling_intl';
import { registerKeyRenderReportPlugin } from '@ies/intl-key-render-report-plugin';
import type {
  KeyRenderReporterOptions,
  GetProjectAndNs,
  TeaDomain,
} from '@ies/intl-key-render-report-plugin';
const kro = {
  projectId: 7031,
  namespaceId: 61530,
  TEAChannelDomain: 'https://mcs.zijieapi.com',
};
I18n.use(registerKeyRenderReportPlugin(kro));

window.KRRList = KRRList;
const App = () => {
  useEffect(() => {
    window.KRRList?.[0].print(); // 打印目前的indexedDb里存储的待上报的内容
  }, []);
  return <div></div>;
};
```
